sentiment.reasoning: The unexpected departure of a COO creates leadership instability and operational uncertainty.

sentiment.reasoning: Rising costs in precision manufacturing directly threaten margins, mirroring the negative impact seen in other sectors.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
